sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Container, Row, Col, Card, Form, Button } from 'react-bootstrap'; const InterviewExperience = () => { const [experiences, setExperiences] = useState([ { id: 1, company: 'Google', role: 'Software Engineer', result: 'Accepted', rounds: [ { title: 'Technical Round 1', description: 'DSA questions focusing on arrays and strings', questions: [ 'Implement a function to reverse words in a string', 'Find the longest substring without repeating characters' ] }, // Add more rounds ], tips: 'Focus on system design and scalability', timeline: '2 weeks total process', salary: 'Competitive package', posted: '2 days ago' } // Add more experiences ]); return (

Interview Experiences

Filter Experiences
Company Role Experience Level Result
{experiences.map(exp => (

{exp.company}

{exp.result}
{exp.role}
Interview Rounds:
{exp.rounds.map((round, index) => (
{round.title}

{round.description}

    {round.questions.map((q, i) => (
  • {q}
    • ))}
))}
Timeline: {exp.timeline}
Posted: {exp.posted}
 ))} ); }; export default InterviewExperience;
